title: ROCm
description: AMD ROCm GPU monitor and rocprofv3 profiler settings.

cellProfileMode.title: Cell Profile mode
cellProfileMode.description: Cell Profile strategy: full cell (toolbar button) or live capture (sidebar sampling of a running cell).

timeWindowSeconds.title: Live capture window (seconds)
timeWindowSeconds.description: Live capture: wall-clock seconds to sample from the running cell.

timeWarmupSeconds.title: Live capture warmup (seconds)
timeWarmupSeconds.description: Live capture: seconds to skip before sampling starts.

withStack.title: Record stacks
withStack.description: Record Python/source stacks for operators (adds overhead).

keepTrace.title: Keep trace for download
keepTrace.description: Keep the chrome trace so it can be downloaded (Perfetto / chrome://tracing).
